resume.title: AI resume optimization
resume.desc: Upload your current resume, find gaps, rewrite bullets for target roles, and quantify results.

chat.title: Conversational editing
chat.desc: Tell AI what you want, preview changes in real time, and accept or reject edits before they land.

interview.title: Mock interviews
interview.desc: Practice with questions based on your resume and target JD, then get focused feedback.

upload.title: Upload resume
upload.desc: Supports PDF, Word, and TXT. AI parses your resume into structured content.

optimize.title: Chat to optimize
optimize.desc: Share your target company and role, then improve each experience with AI.

export.title: Export and apply
export.desc: Export a polished PDF and use it directly for applications.
